import bisect

def solve(nums: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    nums.sort()
    n = len(nums)
    max_len = 1  # At least one element
    for i in range(n):
        target = nums[i] * k
        # Find the rightmost index j where nums[j] <= target, starting from i
        j = bisect.bisect_right(nums, target, i, n) - 1
        if j >= i:
            current_len = j - i + 1
            if current_len > max_len:
                max_len = current_len
    return n - max_len
